ItacPersonItem.Notes: According to Saverio Franchi, Impressioni sceniche, pp. 179, 181. vol. II (2002), p. 95, he was the author of L`Adone, intermedii di Urbano Giorgi accademico fantastico (Roma, Corbelletti, 1631)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
